steps.t: Vaskorn has asked you to continue his search, beginning at Óinsbridge.
You should carry on Vaskorn's search, continuing on to the edge of the lake in Thornholt.
You should carry on Vaskorn's search, continuing on to the outskirts of Thornholt, heading north towards the Steel Keep.
Vaskorn can be found in the Beorning dwellings of Skoghús, in Thornholt. You should hurry back to Vaskorn and alert him to your findings.
